message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Requesting Carson's approval for Step 8">
Carson, pipeline is green and all blocking items resolved for Step 8 (Waiting For). We need your approval for consensus. What is your status?
</teammate-message>

input.content: Already approved -- I've confirmed my +1 three times now (initial review, post-rename re-confirmation, and post-a11y-fix verification). No blocking issues from the HTMX/hypermedia side. You have my approval for Step 8 consensus.

routing.content: Already approved -- I've confirmed my +1 three times now (initial review, post-rename re-confirmation, and post-a11y-fix verification). No blocking issues from the HTMX/hypermedia side. You have my approval for Step 8 consensus.

content.text: Confirmed my approval to Luca for the fourth time. Waiting on remaining team members for 9/9 consensus.
